# @pondoknusa/views

Blade-like view engine for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/views
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/views`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/views) |
| Category | Views & client |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

## Pondoknusa dependencies

- [@pondoknusa/locale](/reference/generated/packages/locale)
- [@pondoknusa/support](/reference/generated/packages/support)

## Public exports

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.
